holdings.infoBox: DVVY is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock at 4.45%, Alphabet at 3.48%, Bank of America at 3.10%, Lam Research at 2.94%, and Cisco Systems at 2.58%.

overview.description: The Invesco Diversified Dividend Opportunities ETF (DVVY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Invesco index. The fund is actively managed and invests primarily in dividend-paying US equities selected for strong fundamentals and valuation. The strategy combines income generation with capital appreciation through diversified sector exposure DVVY was launched on Mar 18, 2026 and is issued by Invesco.
